meta.title: FluxFiles — The file manager that embeds anywhere
meta.description: PHP 8.1+ file manager with S3, R2, and local storage. Alpine.js UI. Embed via iframe + JavaScript SDK.

hero.headline: The file manager that embeds anywhere
hero.sub: PHP ≥ 8.1 + Flysystem 3. Alpine.js UI. Local, S3, Cloudflare R2. Embed with a few lines of JavaScript.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything a modern file manager needs
features.sub: Built for developers who need flexibility.
features.storage_desc: Local, AWS S3, Cloudflare R2 via Flysystem v3 — swap with config, no code change.
features.embed_desc: iframe + postMessage SDK. Standalone UI is Alpine.js (zero build). Works with any framework.
features.jwt_desc: Per-user path prefix, permission claims, disk whitelist, owner-only mode.
features.seo_desc: Title, alt, caption, tags — S3 object metadata (cloud) or sidecar JSON (local). Full-text search.
features.presign_desc: Browser uploads directly to S3/R2 — zero bandwidth on your server.
features.i18n_desc: Default English. Set locale via SDK, URL (?locale=), or FLUXFILES_LOCALE. RTL for Arabic.
features.ai_desc: Claude / OpenAI vision — auto alt text, title, tags.
features.crop_desc: Inline crop tool with aspect ratio presets.
features.optimize_desc: Auto WebP variants — thumb, medium, large.
features.search_desc: SQLite FTS5 across names, titles, tags.
features.darkmode_desc: Light / dark / auto in UI and SDK.
features.byob_desc: Users bring their own S3/R2 — credentials encrypted in JWT (AES-256-GCM).
features.dup_desc: SHA-256 match skips redundant uploads unless you force overwrite.
features.tokenrefresh_desc: onTokenRefresh on 401 — coalesced refresh, retry, and updateToken() for proactive rotation.
features.audit_desc: All write actions logged for compliance.
features.ratelimit_desc: Token bucket per user for API protection.
features.quota_desc: Per-user storage limits via JWT claims.
